subject: Add SDNR actor interaction for OOF PCI use case
commit_message:
Add SDNR actor interaction for OOF PCI use case

This module constructs SDNR request from PCI MS recommendation
controlloop event and handles the response from SDNR

Change-Id: I39704260c4b2eefce414980650d6d2f160f87afb
Issue-ID: POLICY-1089
Signed-off-by: Saravanan A <saravanan.a75@wipro.com>
